terms.title: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
terms.subtitle: Personal data processing
terms.controllerReg: Registered at: Municipal Court in Prague, Section C, File 212230
terms.controllerAddress: Address: Vlkova 532/8, Žižkov, 130 00 Prague 3, Czech Republic
terms.s1Title: 1. Purposes and Legal Grounds for Processing
terms.s1p1: We process personal data on the following grounds:
terms.s1l1: Performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) — for booking services, providing them, and communicating with the client
terms.s1l2: Compliance with legal obligations (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR) — accounting, tax obligations
terms.s1l3: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) — protection of property (video surveillance), service improvement, analytics
terms.s1l4: Consent of the data subject (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) — marketing newsletters, cookies, advertising
terms.s2Title: 2. Methods and Means of Data Processing
terms.s2p1: Processing of personal data is carried out:
terms.s2l2: using automated tools (analytics, cookies, advertising systems)
terms.s2l3: partially without automation (during personal communication or by phone)
terms.s2p2: We apply organizational and technical measures to protect data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
terms.s3p1: Personal data may be transferred to the following categories of recipients:
terms.s3l1: IT service providers and booking system providers (e.g., Alteg.io) — for managing client records
terms.s3l2: Marketing and advertising contractors — exclusively for the setup and management of advertising campaigns
terms.s3l3: Analytics services (e.g., Google Analytics, Meta Pixel) — for analyzing user behavior
terms.s3l4: Government authorities — in cases provided for by law
terms.s3p2: Data transfer is carried out only on lawful grounds and to the necessary extent.
terms.rightsIntro: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR), clients and visitors of the website automycka‑karlin.eu have the following rights regarding their personal data:
terms.r1p1: You have the right to request from Auto Rituals s.r.o. confirmation of whether your personal data are being processed and, if so, to obtain:
terms.r1l4: the expected period of data storage
terms.r1l5: the source of data if not collected directly from you
terms.r2p1: If your data are inaccurate or incomplete, you may request their correction or completion.
terms.r3Title: 3. Right to Erasure (Right to be Forgotten)
terms.r3p1: You may request the deletion of your data if:
terms.r3l1: the data are no longer necessary for the purposes of processing
terms.r3l2: you have withdrawn your consent to processing and there are no other legal grounds for processing
terms.r3l4: it is required by applicable law
terms.r4p1: You may request the restriction of data processing if:
terms.r4l1: the accuracy of the data is contested
terms.r4l2: processing is unlawful, but you oppose erasure
terms.r4l3: the data are no longer necessary, but are required for establishing, exercising, or defending legal claims
terms.r4l4: you object to processing while the lawfulness of the objection is being verified
terms.r5p1: You have the right to receive your data in a structured and machine-readable format (e.g., CSV or JSON) and transfer them to another data controller if technically possible.
terms.r6p1: You may object to the processing of data in the following cases:
terms.r6l1: for the purposes of direct marketing
terms.r6l2: if processing is carried out on lawful grounds, including the performance of tasks in the public interest or on the basis of the legitimate interest of Auto Rituals s.r.o., provided that your interests take precedence
terms.r7p1: If processing is based on your consent, you may withdraw it at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing prior to the withdrawal. To withdraw consent, contact us by email: info@automycka-karlin.eu
terms.r8p1: If you believe that your personal data are being processed in violation of applicable law, please contact us by email: info@automycka-karlin.eu so that we can review and resolve your request.
terms.r8p2: If we are unable to resolve your request satisfactorily, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Authority — Úřad pro ochranu osobních údajů (Office for Personal Data Protection of the Czech Republic).
terms.r9p1: To exercise your rights, you may contact us at:
terms.r9Address: Address: Vlkova 532/8, Žižkov, 130 00 Prague 3, Czech Republic

privacy.title: Privacy Policy of Auto Rituals s.r.o
privacy.subtitle: Transparent information about the processing of your personal data
privacy.aboutP1: The company Automyčka Karlín (hereinafter — "we," "our," or "us") takes the protection of your privacy responsibly. This Privacy Policy is developed in accordance with applicable legislation and aims to ensure transparency regarding how we collect, use, and protect personal data.
privacy.aboutP2: It is important to us that you have a full understanding of what data we process, for what purposes it is used, and what rights you have. We strive to ensure a high level of protection of your personal data and to provide you with control over the information you provide to us.
privacy.s1p1: The company Auto Rituals s.r.o., registered at the Municipal Court in Prague (Czech Republic), owns and operates the website automycka‑karlin.eu and provides car wash and care services, including manual and automatic washing, interior cleaning, and related services.
privacy.s1l1: Address: Vlkova 532/8, Žižkov, 130 00 Prague 3, Czech Republic
privacy.s1p3: Auto Rituals s.r.o. is the personal data controller and determines the purposes, means, and scope of its processing.
privacy.s1p4: This Privacy Policy is designed to inform clients and other natural persons about how we collect, use, and protect your personal data. By using the services of Auto Rituals s.r.o., you entrust us with your data. We process personal data only on legal grounds. Refusal to accept the policy may limit the ability to use our services.
privacy.s2p1: 2.1. We collect, store, process, and protect personal data only to the extent necessary for providing our services, fulfilling legal obligations, and for marketing purposes.
privacy.s2p2: 2.2. By using the services, placing an order for services, or filling out a form on the Auto Rituals s.r.o. website, the client agrees to the terms of this policy and grants the right to collect, store, process, and use personal data in accordance with it.
privacy.s2p3: 2.3. For questions regarding personal data, please write to info@automycka-karlin.eu.
privacy.s3p1: 3.1. Information is used solely for providing services, for example:
privacy.s3l4: organizing payments and monitoring fulfillment of obligations
privacy.s3l6: video surveillance for property protection and service quality
privacy.s3l8: surveys and statistics to improve service
privacy.s3l9: marketing communications with the client's consent
privacy.s3l10: identification and contact data (first name, last name, phone, email)
privacy.s3l12: payment information and method of payment
privacy.s3l15: website behavior (time, traffic source, page visits, clicks)
privacy.s3l16: technical data (IP address, device type, browser, approximate location)
privacy.s3l17: cookies and identifiers (cookies, user ID in analytics systems)
privacy.s3l18: marketing interactions (email opens, clicks, responses to ads, clicks on ad links)
privacy.s3l19: order history (which services were ordered, frequency, average check)
privacy.s3p3: 3.3. We collect only necessary information and do not collect data prohibited by law.
privacy.s3l25: use of cookies on the website to improve service
privacy.s4p1: 4.1. We take all reasonable measures to protect personal data from destruction, alteration, or unauthorized access (physical, technical, and software protection).
privacy.s4p2: 4.2. Data is stored in accordance with legislation and used solely for providing services, dispute resolution, and fulfilling obligations.
privacy.s4l1: Client data — until service completion and 5 years in accordance with requirements established by accounting legislation (No. 563/1991 Sb., on Accounting).
privacy.s4l2: Loyalty program participant data — as long as consent is valid or until consent is withdrawn.
privacy.s4l3: Data provided via the feedback form — up to 12 months from the date of request.
privacy.s4l4: Analytical data (e.g., website behavior data, cookies, user identifiers) — up to 26 months or another period established by the analytics services used.
privacy.s4l5: Video surveillance data — stored for no more than 7–30 days unless longer storage is required for the protection of rights and legitimate interests (e.g., in case of incidents or disputes).
privacy.s4l6: Marketing data (including data for email newsletters and advertising communications) — stored until consent is withdrawn or until data becomes outdated, but no longer than 3 years from the last interaction with the client.
privacy.s5Title: 5. Access to personal information and correction
privacy.s5p1: 5.1. Clients have the right to know whether their data is being processed and, if necessary, to obtain:
privacy.s5l4: retention period or criteria for determining it
privacy.s5l5: source of data if not collected directly from the client
privacy.s5p2: 5.2. If errors or incompleteness in the data are found, the client may request correction or completion.
privacy.s6Title: 6. Deletion and updating of personal data
privacy.s6p1: 6.1. Upon written request by the client, data will be deleted.
privacy.s6l1: it is no longer necessary for processing purposes
privacy.s6l2: the client withdraws consent and there are no other legal grounds
privacy.s7p1: 7.1. Data is not sold or transferred to third parties without grounds.
privacy.s7l1: partners providing services, such as Alteg.io (performance of a contract — Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR)
privacy.s7l2: authorities for law enforcement (compliance with legal obligations — Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR)
privacy.s7l3: insurance and financial companies via intermediaries (performance of a contract / legitimate interest — Art. 6(1)(b/f) GDPR)
privacy.s7l4: third parties for marketing communications only with explicit client consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR)
privacy.s7p3: 7.3. Data is not transferred outside the EU and EEA. In cases where personal data is transferred outside the EU and EEA, it is carried out only on the basis of appropriate legal grounds provided by the GDPR, including:
privacy.s7l5: the existence of a European Commission adequacy decision in the recipient country
privacy.s7l7: other appropriate safeguards in accordance with Art. 46 GDPR
privacy.s7l8: in exceptional cases — based on explicit consent of the data subject or the necessity of contract performance (Art. 49 GDPR)
privacy.s8p1: This Privacy Policy applies to all services of Auto Rituals s.r.o., including the website automycka‑karlin.eu and the company's physical locations.
privacy.s9p1: To improve website functionality, we use cookies. Before using non-essential cookies (including analytical and marketing), we request your prior consent via the cookie banner. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time. Disabling cookies may limit website functionality.
privacy.s10Title: 10. Policy compliance and cooperation with regulators
privacy.s10p1: We regularly check data processing compliance with this Policy. If you believe your personal data is being processed in violation of applicable law, please first contact us at info@automycka-karlin.eu so we can review and resolve your request.
privacy.s10p2: If we are unable to resolve your request satisfactorily, you have the right to submit a complaint to the Úřad pro ochranu osobních údajů (Czech Data Protection Authority).
privacy.s11p1: The policy may be updated periodically. The current version is always available on the website automycka‑karlin.eu.
